case_for: Allen has flashed high-floor WR1 upside as recently as three games ago (22.6, 10.8, 12.8), showing he can still produce big weeks when targets flow his way.
case_against: His current-season trend is weak, with 6.9, 4.9, and 6.3 points in his last three games and a pregame projection of only 6.3, suggesting reduced role or health/efficiency issues.
